name: Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion and potatoes in butter until lightly browned. Add the curry powder, ginger, cayenne pepper, and chilipepper. Stir well.
2. Add the celery and broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Puree the soup in batches using an immersion blender or transfer to a food processor and puree.
4. Return the purée to the pot, season with lemon juice, and stir in additional butter. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
5. Serve hot with toasted bread cubes and a sprinkle of finely chopped green onion on top of each serving.
